strengths: Active hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, directly aligned with the agentic-AI architecture mandate.
Production fintech exposure at RIDE Capital (regulated German investment platform) plus high-throughput distributed systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of requests per second.
Founder of GISCollective, an event-driven platform on Kubernetes — demonstrates end-to-end ownership of architecture, deployment, and long-term operation of a real product.
concerns: Resume lists 'Senior/Staff Software Engineer' titles rather than formal executive leadership (CTO/VP) roles.
No explicit mention of scaling an engineering org from 10 to 30+ people or governing outsourced delivery partners.
Multi-agent AI work is recent (2025–present) rather than spanning multiple years of production operation.

key_factors.factor: Hands-on agentic AI and MCP infrastructure experience
Founder-level ownership and polyglot full-stack breadth

response.justification: Bogdan combines a rare trio for this role: current, hands-on agentic-AI and MCP framework work at re:cinq; regulated fintech experience at RIDE Capital; and proven distributed-systems chops at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic operating millions of requests per second. As founder of GISCollective he has architected and operated an event-driven, Kubernetes-deployed platform end-to-end, mirroring the modular multi-agent, observability-first architecture this CTO role demands. His craftsmanship orientation — TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, public workshops and open-source tooling — signals the disciplined shipping culture and senior technical mentorship the company wants to build, making him a compelling candidate to advance.
